rationale: ORCA is a low-liquidity Solana DEX token with minimal perpetual futures presence; Coinglass public pages show no listed ORCA perpetual markets with publicly accessible funding rate or open interest data on the free tier, and 30-day correlation calculations against BTC, ETH, or NASDAQ require either a paid data API (e.g., Kaiko, Messari Pro) or manual OHLCV computation that is not surfaced on CoinGecko free endpoints or alternative.me.
sources: https://www.coinglass.com/currencies/ORCA — no ORCA perpetual contract listed as of query date
https://www.coingecko.com/en/coins/orca — price/volume data available but correlation metrics not computed on free tier
https://alternative.me/crypto/ — Fear & Greed index only, no per-asset correlation data
https://defillama.com/protocol/orca — TVL/protocol data only, no derivatives data
